lines: IT'S FUCKING OVER. Spain beat Argentina 1–0 in extra time in the Final, meaning Jim — already sitting smug as a cunt at the top on 114 points — has won the entire fucking sweepstake. Spain. The actual World Cup winners. Jim had Spain this whole time and none of you useless pricks did a single thing about it.

Ellis, you absolute fuck — your Argentina got taken apart in the Final itself. Not the quarters, not the semis, the actual bastard Final. You watched your team lose the World Cup final by a single goal in extra time and you've still got nothing to show for it but a 6th place finish and the memory of Yamal ripping your lot a new arsehole.

Wilmot, 3rd place on 87 points — England, Morocco, Norway, Saudi Arabia. Four teams. Four eliminations. Not a single one of those shit-house outfits made it to the Final, and England, your golden fucking hope, couldn't even get close. You finished joint second in points and still won absolutely fuck all. Congratulations on being the most expensive also-ran in this entire sweepstake.

Al is stone dead last on 46 points with Netherlands, Croatia, Norway and Panama — Panama went out in the groups, you catastrophic waste of a sweepstake entry. You were a corpse before the knockouts even got going properly.

No fixtures today because it's done, it's finished, Jim won, go cry into your fucking wallets — and someone sort out getting Jim his money before he starts charging interest, the jammy Spanish-backed bastard.
